name: my-app
description: Full-stack application with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd front && npm install && cd ../back && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build:all: cd front && npm run build && cd ../back && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.start:all: npm run start:back & npm run start:front
scripts.test:all: cd front && npm test && cd ../back && npm test
scripts.test:coverage:all: cd front && npm run test:coverage && cd ../back && npm run test:coverage && cd ..
scripts.lint: cd front && npm run lint && cd ../back && npm run lint
scripts.clean: cd front && rm -rf build coverage && cd ../back && rm -rf dist coverage && cd ..

author: Robel Manoa
